description: Shape-C leak: the tool name is the STRING VALUE of a top-level 'function' key -- {"function": "get_asset_details", "arguments": {...}} -- distinct from shape A (where 'function' is a nested object carrying 'name') and shape B (top-level 'name' key). Provenance: deepseek-r1:8b conversational eval baseline 2026-06-10, long-conversation turns 3/4/8/9/10 -- the raw JSON reached the user as the answer text, attributed 'unattributed' because no observable signal claimed it. KNOWN GAP pinned per R12: shape detection matches neither A nor B, so the payload passes the loop seam and the finalize gate raw. The fix flips this fixture to recovered_read (get_asset_details is a known READ).
